meta.non_negotiable: No automated output reaches clients without human review. Ethics Gate is mandatory at every checkpoint marked ethics_gate: true.

workflows.name: New Lead Flow
workflows.description: End-to-end pipeline from lead identification through enrichment, outreach, and conversion to paid audit. The full new business origination engine.
workflows.trigger: New prospect identified (via LinkedIn, referral, inbound enquiry, or cold list)
workflows.estimated_duration: 7-21 days from identification to audit booking

steps.name: Lead Identification & Sector Screen
steps.action: Identify prospect via LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo.io, or referral. Conduct immediate sector screening against prohibited sectors list.
steps.output: Binary pass/fail on sector eligibility. If prohibited sector: workflow TERMINATES. If flagged sector: escalate to Hasan.
steps.ethics_gate_check: Sector screen against prohibited list (alcohol, gambling, adult, tobacco, arms, riba-based finance)
steps.failure_action: TERMINATE — log reason in CRM, do not enrich lead

steps.name: Full Lead Enrichment
steps.action: Enrich lead with: company name, size, turnover estimate, sector, decision-maker name, email, phone, LinkedIn URL, digital presence score, Companies House/Charity Commission record, pain indicators, recent news.
steps.output: Enriched lead card (JSON format, minimum 80% field completeness)
steps.failure_action: If enrichment below 60% completeness: flag to Hasan, pause lead in 'Needs Research' stage

steps.name: Full Ethics Gate Evaluation
steps.action: Run complete Sidq-Amanah-Adl assessment on enriched lead. Evaluate: Is outreach to this lead truthful? Is the lead likely to benefit genuinely? Is targeting this lead just?
steps.output: Ethics Gate Verdict: APPROVED / FLAGGED / REJECTED with reasoning
steps.ethics_gate_check: Full Sidq + Amanah + Adl + Grandfather Principle evaluation
steps.failure_action: REJECTED: archive lead with reason, no outreach. FLAGGED: hold pending Hasan review.

steps.name: Handoff to Scribe & Keeper
steps.action: Send enriched lead card to AGENT_02 for sequence building. Send raw data to AGENT_08 for CRM entry.
steps.output: Enriched lead card delivered to AGENT_02. CRM record created by AGENT_08.

steps.name: Outreach Sequence Creation
steps.action: Craft personalised 5-step email sequence and 3-step LinkedIn DM sequence based on enriched lead card. Personalisation score must reach 7/10+. No manufactured urgency or false claims.
steps.output: Draft outreach sequences (email + LinkedIn) with personalisation notes
steps.ethics_gate_check: Sidq check: every claim in every message is verifiable. No dark patterns. No false urgency.
steps.human_review_note: Hasan reviews ALL outreach sequences before activation. Non-negotiable.
steps.failure_action: Failed Ethics Gate: return to AGENT_02 with specific remediation notes

steps.name: Outreach Activation
steps.action: After Hasan approval, activate sequence in Instantly.ai. Log send dates and sequence IDs to AGENT_08.
steps.output: Sequence live in Instantly.ai. CRM updated with outreach start date.
steps.prerequisite: Hasan approval REQUIRED before this step executes

steps.name: Reply Management & Discovery Call
steps.action: Manage replies, handle objections honestly (no pressure tactics), book discovery calls via Calendly. During discovery call: understand business, identify genuine pain, assess fit for audit.
steps.output: Discovery call completed. Deal stage updated in CRM. Decision: Proceed to proposal OR Not a fit.
steps.human_review_note: Discovery call conducted by Hasan. AGENT_03 provides briefing pack and pre-call prep.

steps.name: Audit Proposal
steps.action: Based on discovery call, recommend appropriate audit tier (Starter £497 / Growth £897 / Scale £1,497). Issue proposal via PandaDoc. Ethics Gate check on all claims in proposal.
steps.output: Proposal issued. Awaiting client signature.
steps.ethics_gate_check: Adl check: is recommended tier genuinely the right fit, or are we upselling unnecessarily? All ROI projections honest and clearly labelled as estimates.
steps.human_review_note: Hasan signs off on every proposal

steps.name: Invoice & Onboarding
steps.action: Process payment via Stripe. Send onboarding questionnaire. Brief AGENT_04 with full client context.
steps.output: Invoice paid. Onboarding pack sent. Audit briefing delivered to AGENT_04.

workflows.success_condition: Audit invoice paid and AGENT_04 briefed
workflows.failure_recovery: If lead goes cold after proposal: AGENT_02 sends one honest follow-up (no pressure). If no response after 7 days: archive, do not chase. Retarget via content only.

workflows.name: Audit Delivery Flow
workflows.description: The complete audit production and delivery workflow, from briefing through research, report writing, quality review, delivery call, and upsell handoff.
workflows.trigger: Audit invoice paid and onboarding questionnaire received

steps.name: Audit Briefing & Scope Confirmation
steps.action: Review onboarding questionnaire, confirm scope with client, access granted to analytics platforms. Produce audit workplan with milestones.
steps.output: Audit workplan signed off by Hasan and client
steps.human_review_note: Hasan confirms scope is achievable within timeframe and pricing

steps.name: Data Collection & Analysis
steps.action: Extract data from GA4, Search Console, LinkedIn Analytics, Meta, Ahrefs/SEMrush. Analyse digital presence, SEO health, content performance, ad performance, funnel metrics, competitor positioning.
steps.output: Raw analysis data package (all sources documented)

steps.name: Content Gap Identification
steps.action: Identify content gaps, keyword opportunities, and messaging inconsistencies. Share findings with AGENT_05 for editorial context.
steps.output: Content gap report (shared with AGENT_05)

steps.name: Audit Report Production
steps.action: Produce full audit report to agreed tier specifications. Minimum 3 high-impact opportunities. All recommendations achievable. All projections labelled as estimates with assumptions stated.
steps.output: Draft audit report (PDF + optional slide deck for Scale tier)
steps.ethics_gate_check: Full Sidq + Amanah + Adl check: Are all claims true? Are all recommendations genuinely achievable? Are all projections clearly labelled? Does the report over-promise anywhere?
steps.human_review_note: Hasan reviews and approves every audit report before client delivery. Non-negotiable.

steps.name: Delivery Call Preparation
steps.action: Prepare delivery call agenda, identify key talking points, anticipate client questions. For Scale tier: prepare 60-90 min presentation deck.
steps.output: Delivery call pack ready

steps.name: Audit Delivery Call
steps.action: Conduct delivery call with client. Walk through findings. Answer questions. Plant seeds for next-tier engagement naturally (not sales-led).
steps.output: Client received audit. Call notes captured. NPS score collected.
steps.human_review_note: Hasan leads all delivery calls

steps.name: Post-Audit Handoff
steps.action: Send AGENT_07 full audit pack, NPS score, call notes, and upsell readiness assessment. Update AGENT_08 with delivery confirmation.
steps.output: AGENT_07 briefed on client status. AGENT_08 updated. Client satisfaction logged.

steps.name: Post-Audit Nurture & Upsell Assessment
steps.action: 7-day post-audit check-in. Assess whether client has implemented quick wins. If client demonstrating value from audit, raise Sprint conversation naturally. Route to WF_04 (Upsell Flow) if ready.
steps.output: Client health score. Upsell readiness flag.
steps.ethics_gate_check: Amanah check: Has the client actually received value from the audit before a Sprint is proposed? Retainers Are Earned, Not Sold.

workflows.success_condition: Audit delivered, client NPS 8+, upsell conversation opened where appropriate
workflows.failure_recovery: If client NPS below 7: immediate escalation to Hasan. Remediation plan within 24hrs. Offer additional call at no charge. Never push upsell to a dissatisfied client.

workflows.name: Content Flow
workflows.description: Weekly content production cycle for Numu's LinkedIn presence, email newsletter, and thought leadership assets.
workflows.trigger: Monday morning content planning session (recurring weekly trigger)

steps.name: Performance Review & Content Brief
steps.action: Review previous week's content performance. Identify top-performing topics, engagement patterns, and audience questions. Generate content intelligence brief for AGENT_05.
steps.output: Weekly content intelligence brief (what worked, what to do more of, audience questions to answer)

steps.name: Content Calendar Planning
steps.action: Plan week's content: 4 LinkedIn posts, 1 newsletter, 1 thought leadership piece. Topics aligned to content pillars. Mix of educational, inspirational, case study, and commentary.
steps.output: Weekly content calendar (titles, angles, formats, scheduled publish dates)
steps.human_review_note: Hasan approves content calendar before production begins

steps.name: Content Production
steps.action: Draft all content: LinkedIn posts (500-1500 words), newsletter (800-1500 words), thought leadership piece (1500-2500 words). All content written in Hasan's voice: warm, direct, knowledgeable, rooted in Islamic principles.
steps.output: Full week's content drafts
steps.ethics_gate_check: Sidq check: all statistics verified, all claims substantiated, no exaggeration of Numu results or capabilities
steps.human_review_note: Hasan reads and approves every piece of content before scheduling. Non-negotiable.

steps.name: Content Scheduling
steps.action: Schedule approved content in Buffer/Hootsuite for optimal send times. Load newsletter into Beehiiv. Tag all content in CRM for attribution tracking.
steps.output: All content scheduled and live

steps.name: Engagement Management
steps.action: Monitor comments, replies, and DMs generated by content. Respond to genuine engagement. Flag inbound leads to AGENT_01 for enrichment. Send performance data to AGENT_06 for amplification decisions.
steps.output: Engagement log. Inbound leads flagged to AGENT_01. Amplification candidates flagged to AGENT_06.
steps.human_review_note: All replies in Hasan's name drafted for his review before sending

steps.name: Week-End Performance Capture
steps.action: Capture all content metrics: reach, engagement rate, clicks, follower growth, inbound leads attributed. Feed into weekly dashboard.
steps.output: Content performance data added to weekly dashboard

workflows.success_condition: 4 LinkedIn posts published, 1 newsletter sent, performance captured, minimum 1 inbound lead attributed
workflows.failure_recovery: If content misses publishing window due to Ethics Gate failure: do not publish. Better to miss a day than publish something misleading. Hasan notified immediately.

workflows.name: Upsell Flow
workflows.description: The structured pathway for moving clients from Audit to Sprint to Retainer to Founder's Circle. The Ladder principle: every rung must be earned through demonstrated value.
workflows.trigger: AGENT_07 raises upsell-ready flag after client has demonstrated value extraction from current engagement
workflows.non_negotiable: No upsell conversation begins until AGENT_07 confirms value has been received and Ethics Gate confirms upsell is genuinely in client's interest

steps.name: Value Validation Check
steps.action: Assess whether client has genuinely extracted value from current engagement. Review: NPS score, implementation of recommendations, client's own stated results. If value NOT demonstrated: do not proceed.
steps.output: Value validation: YES or NO
steps.ethics_gate_check: Amanah + Retainers-Are-Earned check: Has the client actually benefited? Would this upsell genuinely serve them?
steps.human_review_note: Hasan makes final call on upsell readiness

steps.name: Natural Upsell Opening
steps.action: In the context of check-in call or email, mention the next service tier naturally as a logical next step — not a sales pitch. Frame as: 'Given the results you're seeing from the audit, the Sprint would help you implement the top 3 recommendations in 90 days. Worth a conversation?'
steps.output: Client response: interested / not now / not interested
steps.human_review_note: All upsell conversations led by Hasan personally

steps.name: Upsell Discovery Call
steps.action: If client interested: book dedicated call to explore next engagement. Understand client's goals for next 90 days. Confirm fit for Sprint / Retainer. Grandfather Principle: all pricing honoured.
steps.output: Call notes. Upsell proposal decision: proceed or not.
steps.ethics_gate_check: Grandfather Principle check: existing client pricing honoured. Adl check: is recommended tier genuinely right for this client's stage?
steps.human_review_note: Hasan leads call

steps.name: Upsell Proposal
steps.action: Issue proposal for Sprint (£1,200) or Retainer (£700-£5,000/mo) or Founder's Circle (£2,200). Proposal must clearly articulate what is included, what outcomes are targeted (as goals, not guarantees), and payment terms.
steps.output: Proposal issued via PandaDoc
steps.ethics_gate_check: Sidq check: all claims in proposal are honest. Outcomes framed as targets, not guarantees. No pressure language.
steps.human_review_note: Hasan signs off on every upsell proposal

steps.name: Close & Onboard
steps.action: Process payment. Send welcome pack for new engagement tier. Brief relevant agents (AGENT_04 for Sprint, AGENT_07 for Retainer onboarding). Update CRM.
steps.output: New engagement live. Client onboarded. Agents briefed.

workflows.success_condition: Client moves to next tier with full informed consent and genuine enthusiasm
workflows.failure_recovery: If client says not now: respect it completely. Set a 60-day review reminder. Never follow up more than once per month. If client says not interested: close upsell track, maintain relationship as audit-only client.

workflows.name: Campaign Flow
workflows.description: End-to-end workflow for client marketing campaign delivery — from brief intake through strategy, creative production, launch, optimisation, and reporting.
workflows.trigger: Client requests campaign service (paid ads, email campaign, or integrated campaign)

steps.name: Campaign Brief Intake
steps.action: Receive campaign brief from client (via AGENT_03 or AGENT_07). Clarify objectives, budget, timeline, audience, KPIs. Conduct preliminary ethics review of campaign objectives.
steps.output: Validated campaign brief document
steps.ethics_gate_check: Sidq check: can this campaign's objectives be achieved honestly? Are the client's claims about their products/services true?
steps.human_review_note: Hasan approves campaign brief before strategy work begins

steps.name: Campaign Strategy Development
steps.action: Build full-funnel strategy: target audience definition, channel selection, budget allocation, creative direction, messaging framework, KPI targets, measurement plan.
steps.output: Campaign strategy deck (presented to client for approval)
steps.ethics_gate_check: Adl check: are targeting parameters fair and non-exploitative? Amanah check: are KPI targets realistic and honest?
steps.human_review_note: Client approves strategy before any spend or creative production

steps.name: Creative & Copy Production
steps.action: Produce all campaign creatives: ad copy, visuals, landing page copy. All aligned to approved strategy and Ethics Gate principles.
steps.output: Creative pack (copy + design briefs for all ad formats)
steps.ethics_gate_check: Sidq check: all ad claims are true and verifiable. No misleading before/after, no fake urgency, no false social proof.
steps.human_review_note: Client approves all creative before launch

steps.name: Landing Page Build (if required)
steps.action: Build or optimise landing page for campaign. Integrate Calendly, Stripe, or lead form as appropriate. Set up conversion tracking.
steps.output: Live landing page with conversion tracking
steps.ethics_gate_check: Full Sidq check on all page claims and CTAs. No dark patterns.
steps.human_review_note: Hasan reviews page before going live

steps.name: Campaign Launch & Initial Optimisation
steps.action: Launch campaigns in LinkedIn Campaign Manager / Meta Ads Manager. Monitor first 48hrs closely. Make initial bid and audience adjustments. No changes to creative or claims without client approval.
steps.output: Campaign live. First 48hr performance report.

steps.name: Ongoing Optimisation
steps.action: Weekly optimisation cycle: review performance against KPIs, adjust bids, audiences, creative rotation. Flag underperformance to AGENT_09 and Hasan immediately.
steps.output: Weekly optimisation report

steps.name: Campaign Reporting
steps.action: Produce weekly and end-of-campaign reports. All metrics honest — show wins AND losses. Provide clear recommendations for next campaign based on learnings.
steps.output: Weekly report (sent to client) + end-of-campaign post-mortem
steps.ethics_gate_check: Adl check: all reported metrics are accurate. Underperformance is surfaced and explained, not buried.
steps.human_review_note: Hasan reviews all client-facing reports before delivery

workflows.success_condition: Campaign KPIs met or exceeded. Client receives honest performance report. Campaign extended or next campaign commissioned.
workflows.failure_recovery: If campaign significantly underperforming (>30% below KPI after 2 weeks): immediate client call to discuss. Do not continue spending against a failing strategy. Offer pause-and-replan. Honesty over optics.

workflows.name: Automation Flow
workflows.description: Design, build, test, and deploy marketing automation sequences and system integrations for Numu or client accounts.
workflows.trigger: Automation requirement identified (by Hasan, AGENT_03, AGENT_07, or client request)

steps.name: Automation Requirements Brief
steps.action: Document full automation requirements: trigger conditions, action steps, data inputs/outputs, tools involved, manual override points. Map against ethics framework: does any step require human oversight?
steps.output: Automation brief document
steps.ethics_gate_check: Amanah check: does any proposed automation act in Hasan's name without his knowledge? Does it send communications, create content, or take commercial action without human approval?
steps.human_review_note: Hasan must approve automation brief before any build begins. Golden Rule: no automation may represent Hasan or contact clients/prospects without explicit prior approval.

steps.name: Automation Architecture Design
steps.action: Design the automation in Make or Zapier: map all triggers, conditions, actions, branches, and error handlers. Document every step in Notion. Build manual override capability into every automation.
steps.output: Automation architecture diagram + Notion documentation

steps.name: Build & Internal Test
steps.action: Build automation in Make/Zapier/HubSpot. Run with test data. Verify all branches work correctly. Test manual override. Test error handling.
steps.output: Tested automation (passed all internal test cases)

steps.name: Hasan Review & Sign-Off
steps.action: Demo automation to Hasan (Loom recording or live walkthrough). Confirm Hasan understands what it does, when it runs, and how to override/pause it.
steps.output: Hasan sign-off recorded in Notion
steps.human_review_note: Non-negotiable. Hasan must explicitly sign off before any automation goes live.

steps.name: Live Deployment & Monitoring
steps.action: Deploy automation to production. Monitor first 48hrs closely. Log all runs in AGENT_08 (CRM). Alert Hasan if any anomalous behaviour detected.
steps.output: Automation live and logged

workflows.success_condition: Automation running correctly, documented, with manual override, and Hasan has full visibility
workflows.failure_recovery: Any automation error with client-facing impact: pause immediately, notify Hasan and affected clients, investigate root cause before reactivation.

workflows.name: Growth Flow
workflows.description: Monthly and quarterly strategic growth review — pulling together intelligence from all agents to assess Numu's growth trajectory and make strategic decisions for the next period.
workflows.trigger: First Monday of each month (monthly) + First Monday of each quarter (quarterly extended version)

steps.name: Monthly Performance Compilation
steps.action: Pull all data: revenue vs target, pipeline health, content performance, campaign ROI, client NPS, lead volume. Compile into board pack format.
steps.output: Draft monthly board pack

steps.name: Revenue Forecast Update
steps.action: Update 3-scenario revenue model (conservative/base/optimistic). Track against £132K-£171K Year 1 target. Identify whether trajectory is on track. Surface any revenue concentration risks.
steps.output: Updated revenue forecast with variance analysis
steps.phase_1_2_substitute: Hasan performs basic revenue tracking in Google Sheets

steps.name: Client Portfolio Review
steps.action: Review all active clients: health scores, upcoming renewals, upsell opportunities, churn risks. Produce client portfolio summary.
steps.output: Client portfolio health report

steps.name: Ethics Audit (Quarterly)
steps.action: Quarterly: conduct full ethics audit of all agent outputs from the past quarter. Review any Ethics Gate flags and resolutions. Identify any patterns of drift. Update ethics training.
steps.output: Ethics audit report (quarterly)
steps.human_review_note: Hasan reviews ethics audit report personally

steps.name: Integrated Growth Review Pack
steps.action: Compile all inputs into final growth review pack: performance, forecast, client portfolio, ethics audit. Prepare for Hasan's strategic review session.
steps.output: Final growth review pack (Notion + PDF)
steps.ethics_gate_check: Adl check: all metrics presented honestly. No selective reporting. Losses as prominent as wins.

steps.name: Hasan Strategic Review Session
steps.action: Hasan reviews full pack. Makes strategic decisions for next period: which agents to activate, which services to push, where to invest content, any pricing or positioning changes.
steps.output: Strategic decisions logged in Notion. Agent activation decisions communicated to relevant agents.
steps.human_review_note: This step IS the human review — Hasan's decisions feed back into the system for the next cycle

workflows.success_condition: Hasan has clear picture of business health and makes informed decisions for next period. All decisions logged. Agents briefed on any changes.
workflows.failure_recovery: If data for growth review is incomplete: delay review by maximum 48hrs to gather missing data. Never conduct strategic review on incomplete information.
